TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Nakahara, title = Nakahara, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nakahara} }

S.FORM: = Nakahara = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang nakahara. 284 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 865 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 89% niqan 774 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 11% niqan 91 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq73%, Tayal11%, Bunun2%, Amis2%, Paiwan1%. Hangan alang Alang Gluban Pnteanaq knmalu alang Sediq alang Gluban (Cing-ryo) pa to bay kluwanan Sediq kana, sediq tnualang tmhangan nanaq u alang Gluban mchaya. Nniqan na Nan-to-keyng Jin-ay-go Hu-cu-cwen alang Gluban. Llabang na Alang Gluban (Seyryo) pa wa mniq Nan-to-keyng Jin-ay-go Pryaxan hidaw, hruwan hidaw u msdalih alang Nakahara (Sediq Tgdaya) mi alang Baybara (Tayal) mi Hwey-swen rin-Cang, pryaxan hidaw pa lmutuc alang Kwo-sing-go alang Mey-rin (sediq Holo mi sediq Hakka), hruwan hidaw tuhunacu niqan Yayung Pey-kang ka mtqiri mi, pryaxan hidaw pa niqan Yayung Baykey, tudaya u niqan Dwiyaq Baybara ka sdharan, kiya ka wisu so thmuk kcka mi prmurux nanaq mi, so tssu bay mi mndungu baya alang. Lnglingay ti-ri Wa mniq ssiyaw yayung mi ayu. Pklaun pkla ppaan ruru M uda kwo-taw 1 Cong-san-kaw, uxay daw muda Kwo-taw 3 Formosa kaw-su-kong-ru‚ÜíKwo-taw 6 Swey-sa-ryeyn kaw-su-kong-ru‚ÜíMstabuy Kwo-sing cyaw-ryo-taw‚ÜíKwo-sing-ru‚ÜíCang-pey-ru‚ÜíCong-hwa-ru‚ÜíAlang Buwarung. Pwaluk pnatas Rncuhan dieyn-cu Kkluwan tnsediq alang Ddiyun na kari Snhiyan kyokay
S.PHON: = nakańßa…ĺa = gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč nakańßa…ĺa. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq**%, tajal**%, bunun*%, amis*%, paiwan*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč gluban pnt…ôanaq knmalu alaŇč s…ôdiq alaŇč gluban ( ¶iŇč-…ĺjo) pa to baj kluwanan s…ôdiq kana, s…ôdiq tnualaŇč tmńßaŇčan nanaq u alaŇč gluban m ¶ńßaja. nniqan na nan-to-k…ôŇč …üin-aj-go ńßu- ¶u- ¶w…ôn alaŇč gluban. llabaŇč na alaŇč gluban (s…ô…ĺjo) pa wa mniq nan-to-k…ôŇč …üin-aj-go p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw, ńß…ĺuwan ńßidaw u msdalińß alaŇč nakańßa…ĺa (s…ôdiq tgdaja) mi alaŇč bajba…ĺa (tajal) mi ńßw…ô-sw…ôn …ĺin- ¶aŇč, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw pa lmutu ¶ alaŇč kwo-siŇč-go alaŇč m…ô-…ĺin (s…ôdiq ńßolo mi s…ôdiq ńßakka), ńß…ĺuwan ńßidaw tuńßuna ¶u niqan jajuŇč p…ô-kaŇč ka mtqi…ĺi mi, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw pa niqan jajuŇč bajk…ô, tudaja u niqan dwijaq bajba…ĺa ka sdńßa…ĺan, kija ka wisu so tńßmuk k ¶ka mi p…ĺmu…ĺux nanaq mi, so tssu baj mi mnduŇču baja alaŇč. lŇčliŇčaj ti-…ĺi wa mniq ssijaw jajuŇč mi aju. pklaun pkla ppaan …ĺu…ĺu m uda kwo-taw * ¶oŇč-san-kaw, uxaj daw muda kwo-taw * *o…ĺmosa kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu*kwo-taw * sw…ô-sa-…ĺj…ôn kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu*mstabuj kwo-siŇč ¶jaw-…ĺjo-taw*kwo-siŇč-…ĺu* ¶aŇč-p…ô-…ĺu* ¶oŇč-ńßwa-…ĺu*alaŇč buwa…ĺuŇč. pwaluk pnatas …ĺn ¶uńßan di…ôn- ¶u kkluwan tns…ôdiq alaŇč ddijun na ka…ĺi snńßijan kjokaj
S.FORM: = Nakahara = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang nakahara. 284 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 865 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 89% niqan 774 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 11% niqan 91 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq73%, Tayal11%, Bunun2%, Amis2%, Paiwan1%. Hangan alang Alang Gluban Pnteanaq knmalu alang Sediq alang Gluban (Cing-ryo) pa to bay kluwanan Sediq kana, sediq tnualang tmhangan nanaq u alang Gluban mchaya. Nniqan na Nan-to-keyng Jin-ay-go Hu-cu-cwen alang Gluban. Llabang na Alang Gluban (Seyryo) pa wa mniq Nan-to-keyng Jin-ay-go Pryaxan hidaw, hruwan hidaw u msdalih alang Nakahara (Sediq Tgdaya) mi alang Baybara (Tayal) mi Hwey-swen rin-Cang, pryaxan hidaw pa lmutuc alang Kwo-sing-go alang Mey-rin (sediq Holo mi sediq Hakka), hruwan hidaw tuhunacu niqan Yayung Pey-kang ka mtqiri mi, pryaxan hidaw pa niqan Yayung Baykey, tudaya u niqan Dwiyaq Baybara ka sdharan, kiya ka wisu so thmuk kcka mi prmurux nanaq mi, so tssu bay mi mndungu baya alang. Lnglingay ti-ri Wa mniq ssiyaw yayung mi ayu. Pklaun pkla ppaan ruru M uda kwo-taw 1 Cong-san-kaw, uxay daw muda Kwo-taw 3 Formosa kaw-su-kong-ru‚ÜíKwo-taw 6 Swey-sa-ryeyn kaw-su-kong-ru‚ÜíMstabuy Kwo-sing cyaw-ryo-taw‚ÜíKwo-sing-ru‚ÜíCang-pey-ru‚ÜíCong-hwa-ru‚ÜíAlang Buwarung. Pwaluk pnatas Rncuhan dieyn-cu Kkluwan tnsediq alang Ddiyun na kari Snhiyan kyokay
